---
title: "stepX_beta_comparisons"
author: "Nico Matthew S. Valencia"
output: html_document
---

You can refer here to how my files looked when I sent it to google cloud:
gs://neurogap-bge-imputed-regional/nico/sud-gwas/rsid_match
If you just download like from "gsutil cp gs://neurogap-bge-imputed-regional/nico/sud-gwas/rsid_match"
you'll have the same structure

```{r}

#install.packages("ggplot2")

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggrepel)
```




```{r}
# Hatoum: list all harmonized pairwise files
data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/hatoum_lifted_harmonized"

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_Hatoum2023AddictionEuropean_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

files
```

```{r}
# Hatoum: pvalue threshold
hatoum_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_thresh <- 1e-2
```

```{r}
# Hatoum: graphing

for (file in files) {

  cat("\nProcessing:", basename(file), "\n")

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    fill = TRUE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  x_beta <- grep("^beta_ku$|^beta_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_beta <- grep("^beta_Hatoum2023AddictionEuropean.*_to_khat_A1$", names(dat), value = TRUE)

  x_p <- grep("^p_ku$|^p_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_p <- "P"

  cat("x_beta:", x_beta, "\n")
  cat("y_beta:", y_beta, "\n")
  cat("x_p:", x_p, "\n")
  cat("y_p:", y_p, "\n")

  if (length(x_beta) != 1 || length(y_beta) != 1 || length(x_p) != 1 || !(y_p %in% names(dat))) {
    cat("Skipping because required columns were not found.\n")
    print(names(dat))
    next
  }

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < hatoum_thresh,
  ]

  pair_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))

  khat_trait <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "Khat Use",
    "Khat Use Frequency"
  )

  khat_n_label <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "KU N = 33,210",
    "KUF N = 25,869"
  )

  sud_n_label <- "SUD N = 1,025,550"

  cat("Total SNPs:", nrow(dat), "\n")
  cat("Filtered SNPs:", nrow(dat_filt), "\n")

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) dat_filt else dat

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0("NGAP P < ", ku_thresh, " | Hatoum P < ", hatoum_thresh)
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("NGAP: ", khat_trait, " x Hatoum Addiction European"),
      subtitle = paste0(
        khat_n_label,
        " | ",
        sud_n_label,
        " | ",
        plot_label,
        " | SNPs = ", nrow(plot_dat),
        " | r = ", round(pearson_r, 4)
      ),
      x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
      y = "Hatoum Addiction beta"
    )

  print(p)
}

```

```{r}
# Johnson: setup

data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/johnson_lifted_harmonized"

ku_thresh <- 1e-2
johnson_thresh <- 1e-3

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_CUD_EUR_casecontrol_public_11\\.14\\.2020_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Files found:", length(files), "\n")
print(basename(files))

```

```{r}
# Johnson: beta comparison plots

for (file in files) {

  cat("\nProcessing:", basename(file), "\n")

  is_ku <- grepl("^ku_", basename(file))

  if (is_ku) {
    khat_beta <- "beta_ku"
    khat_p <- "p_ku"
    khat_trait <- "Khat Use"
    khat_n_label <- "KU N = 33,210"
  } else {
    khat_beta <- "beta_kuf"
    khat_p <- "p_kuf"
    khat_trait <- "Khat Use Frequency"
    khat_n_label <- "KUF N = 25,869"
  }

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = FALSE,
    sep = "\t",
    skip = 1,
    fill = TRUE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    col.names = c(
      "khat_marker",
      "CHR",
      "BP",
      "khat_A1",
      "khat_A2",
      khat_beta,
      khat_p,
      "johnson_marker",
      "johnson_A1",
      "johnson_A2",
      "beta_CUD_EUR_casecontrol",
      "beta_CUD_EUR_casecontrol_to_khat_A1",
      "P",
      "allele_match_status",
      "SE",
      "N",
      "N_CAS",
      "N_CON"
    )
  )

  x_beta <- khat_beta
  y_beta <- "beta_CUD_EUR_casecontrol_to_khat_A1"
  x_p <- khat_p
  y_p <- "P"

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < johnson_thresh,
  ]

  cat("Total SNPs:", nrow(dat), "\n")
  cat("Filtered SNPs:", nrow(dat_filt), "\n")

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) dat_filt else dat

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0("NGAP P < ", ku_thresh, " | Johnson P < ", johnson_thresh)
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("NGAP ", khat_trait, " x Johnson CUD European Case-Control"),
      subtitle = paste0(
        khat_n_label,
        " | CUD N = 357,806",
        " | ",
        plot_label,
        " | SNPs = ", nrow(plot_dat),
        " | r = ", round(pearson_r, 4)
      ),
      x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
      y = "Johnson CUD Beta"
    )

  print(p)
}

# output labels:
# Full public: Everyone
# Case-control: Includes unrelated individuals
```

```{r}
# Levey: setup

data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/levey_lifted_harmonized"

levey_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_thresh <- 1e-2

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_(AFR|EUR)_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of files found:", length(files), "\n")
print(basename(files))
```

```{r}
# Levey: beta comparison plots

for (file in files) {

  cat("\nProcessing:", basename(file), "\n")

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    fill = TRUE
  )

  x_beta <- grep("^beta_ku$|^beta_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_beta <- grep("_to_khat_A1$", names(dat), value = TRUE)

  x_p <- grep("^p_ku$|^p_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_p <- "pval"

  cat("x_beta:", x_beta, "\n")
  cat("y_beta:", y_beta, "\n")
  cat("x_p:", x_p, "\n")
  cat("y_p:", y_p, "\n")

  stopifnot(
    length(x_beta) == 1,
    length(y_beta) == 1,
    length(x_p) == 1,
    y_p %in% names(dat)
  )

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < levey_thresh,
  ]

  cat("Total SNPs:", nrow(dat), "\n")
  cat("Filtered SNPs:", nrow(dat_filt), "\n")

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) dat_filt else dat

  pair_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))

  khat_trait <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "Khat Use",
    "Khat Use Frequency"
  )

  ancestry_label <- ifelse(
    grepl("_AFR_", pair_name),
    "African",
    "European"
  )

  levey_trait <- paste0("Levey ", ancestry_label)

  cud_n_label <- ifelse(
    ancestry_label == "African",
    "CUD N = 123,208",
    "CUD N = 886,025"
  )

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0("NeuroGAP P < ", ku_thresh, " | Levey P < ", levey_thresh)
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
    title = paste0("NGAP: ", khat_trait, " x ", levey_trait, " CUD"),
    subtitle = paste0(
      cud_n_label,
      " | ",
      plot_label,
      " | SNPs = ", nrow(plot_dat),
      " | r = ", round(pearson_r, 4)
    ),
    x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
    y = "CUD Beta"
)

  print(p)
}
```
```{r}
# Liu: Read ins 

data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/liu_lifted_harmonized"

liu_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_thresh <- 1e-2

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_.+_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

length(files)
basename(files)

```

```{r}
# Liu: beta comparisons

for (file in files) {

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    fill = TRUE
  )

  x_beta <- grep("^beta_ku$|^beta_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_beta <- grep("_to_khat_A1$", names(dat), value = TRUE)

  x_p <- grep("^p_ku$|^p_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_p <- "PVALUE"

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  dat_filt <- subset(
    dat,
    dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < liu_thresh
  )

  if (nrow(dat_filt) < 3)
    next

  pair_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))

  khat_trait <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "Khat Use",
    "Khat Use Frequency"
  )

  liu_trait <- sub("^(ku|kuf)_", "", pair_name)
  liu_trait <- sub("_harmonized$", "", liu_trait)

  liu_trait <- switch(
    liu_trait,
    AgeofInitiation = "Age of Initiation",
    AgeOfInitiation_WithoutUKB = "Age of Initiation (Without UKB)",
    CigarettesPerDay = "Cigarettes per Day",
    CigarettesPerDay_WithoutUKB = "Cigarettes per Day (Without UKB)",
    DrinksPerWeek = "Drinks per Week",
    DrinksPerWeek_WithoutUKB = "Drinks per Week (Without UKB)",
    SmokingInitiation = "Smoking Initiation",
    SmokingInitiation_WithoutUKB = "Smoking Initiation (Without UKB)",
    SmokingCessation = "Smoking Cessation",
    SmokingCessation_WithoutUKB = "Smoking Cessation (Without UKB)",
    liu_trait
  )

  khat_n_label <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "KU N = 33,210",
    "KUF N = 25,869"
  )

  liu_n_lookup <- c(
  "Smoking Initiation" = "632,802",
  "Smoking Initiation (No UKB)" = "559,471",
  "Smoking Cessation" = "312,821",
  "Smoking Cessation (No UKB)" = "281,073",
  "Drinks per Week" = "537,349",
  "Drinks per Week (No UKB)" = "477,350",
  "Cigarettes per Day" = "263,954",
  "Cigarettes per Day (No UKB)" = "242,429",
  "Age of Initiation" = "262,990",
  "Age of Initiation (No UKB)" = "240,603"
  )

  liu_n_label <- if (liu_trait %in% names(liu_n_lookup)) {
    paste0(liu_trait, " N = ", liu_n_lookup[[liu_trait]])
  } else {
    paste0(liu_trait, " N = NA")
  }

  pearson_r <- cor(
    dat_filt[[x_beta]],
    dat_filt[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  print(
    ggplot(
      dat_filt,
      aes(
        x = .data[[x_beta]],
        y = .data[[y_beta]]
      )
    ) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
      theme_bw() +
      labs(
        title = paste0(
          "NGAP: ",
          khat_trait,
          " x Liu: ",
          liu_trait
        ),
        subtitle = paste0(
          "NeuroGAP P < ", ku_thresh,
          " | Liu P < ", liu_thresh,
          " | N = ", nrow(dat_filt),
          " | r = ", round(pearson_r, 4)
        ),
        x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
        y = paste0(liu_trait, " beta")
      )
  )
}
```
```{r}
# Saunders: setup

data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/saunders_lifted_harmonized"

saunders_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_thresh <- 1e-2

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_(AgeSmk|CigDay|DrnkWk|SmkCes|SmkInit)_(AFR|AMR|EAS|EUR)_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of files found:", length(files), "\n")
print(basename(files))
```

```{r}
# Saunders: beta comparison plots

for (file in files) {

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    fill = TRUE
  )

  x_beta <- grep("^beta_ku$|^beta_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_beta <- grep("_to_khat_A1$", names(dat), value = TRUE)

  x_p <- grep("^p_ku$|^p_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_p <- "P"

  stopifnot(
    length(x_beta) == 1,
    length(y_beta) == 1,
    length(x_p) == 1,
    y_p %in% names(dat)
  )

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < saunders_thresh,
  ]

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) dat_filt else dat

  pair_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))

  khat_trait <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "Khat Use",
    "Khat Use Frequency"
  )

  khat_n_label <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "KU N = 33,210",
    "KUF N = 25,869"
  )

  saunders_raw <- sub("^(ku|kuf)_", "", pair_name)
  saunders_raw <- sub("_harmonized$", "", saunders_raw)

  ancestry <- sub("^.*_(AFR|AMR|EAS|EUR)$", "\\1", saunders_raw)
  trait_raw <- sub("_(AFR|AMR|EAS|EUR)$", "", saunders_raw)

  ancestry_label <- switch(
    ancestry,
    AFR = "AFR",
    AMR = "AMR",
    EAS = "EAS",
    EUR = "EUR",
    ancestry
  )

  trait_label <- switch(
    trait_raw,
    AgeSmk = "Age SmkInit",
    CigDay = "Cigs per Day",
    DrnkWk = "Drnks per Week",
    SmkCes = "Age SmkCess",
    SmkInit = "SmkInit",
    trait_raw
  )

  saunders_n <- case_when(
    trait_raw == "SmkInit" & ancestry == "EUR" ~ 805431,
    trait_raw == "SmkInit" & ancestry == "AMR" ~ 286026,
    trait_raw == "SmkInit" & ancestry == "AFR" ~ 119589,
    trait_raw == "SmkInit" & ancestry == "EAS" ~ 296395,

    trait_raw == "AgeSmk" & ancestry == "EUR" ~ 323836,
    trait_raw == "AgeSmk" & ancestry == "AMR" ~ 33914,
    trait_raw == "AgeSmk" & ancestry == "AFR" ~ 17508,
    trait_raw == "AgeSmk" & ancestry == "EAS" ~ 63353,

    trait_raw == "CigDay" & ancestry == "EUR" ~ 326497,
    trait_raw == "CigDay" & ancestry == "AMR" ~ 35129,
    trait_raw == "CigDay" & ancestry == "AFR" ~ 20157,
    trait_raw == "CigDay" & ancestry == "EAS" ~ 108275,

    trait_raw == "SmkCes" & ancestry == "EUR" ~ 388313,
    trait_raw == "SmkCes" & ancestry == "AMR" ~ 90525,
    trait_raw == "SmkCes" & ancestry == "AFR" ~ 34970,
    trait_raw == "SmkCes" & ancestry == "EAS" ~ 121859,

    trait_raw == "DrnkWk" & ancestry == "EUR" ~ 666978,
    trait_raw == "DrnkWk" & ancestry == "AMR" ~ 274707,
    trait_raw == "DrnkWk" & ancestry == "AFR" ~ 95343,
    trait_raw == "DrnkWk" & ancestry == "EAS" ~ 160775,

    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )

  saunders_n_label <- paste0(
    trait_label,
    " ",
    ancestry,
    " N = ",
    format(saunders_n, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE)
  )

  saunders_label <- paste0(
    "Saunders ",
    trait_label,
    " ",
    ancestry_label
  )

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0("NGAP P < ", ku_thresh, " | Saunders P < ", saunders_thresh)
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("NGAP: ", khat_trait, " x ", saunders_label),
      subtitle = paste0(
        khat_n_label,
        " | ",
        saunders_n_label,
        " | ",
        plot_label,
        " | SNPs = ", nrow(plot_dat),
        " | r = ", round(pearson_r, 4)
      ),
      x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
      y = paste0(trait_raw, " beta")
    )

  print(p)
}

# 06-29-26 --> rerun this because current doesn't separate words correctly on y-axis
  # added space
# Note: Data for EUR doesn't include 23andMe
```
```{r}
# Walters: setup

data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/walters_lifted_harmonized"

walters_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_thresh <- 1e-2

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_pgc_alcdep_trans_fe_unrel_geno_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of files found:", length(files), "\n")
print(basename(files))
```

```{r}
# Walters: beta comparison plots

for (file in files) {

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    fill = TRUE
  )

  x_beta <- grep("^beta_ku$|^beta_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_beta <- grep("_to_khat_A1$", names(dat), value = TRUE)

  x_p <- grep("^p_ku$|^p_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_p <- "P"

  stopifnot(
    length(x_beta) == 1,
    length(y_beta) == 1,
    length(x_p) == 1,
    y_p %in% names(dat)
  )

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < walters_thresh,
  ]

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) dat_filt else dat

  pair_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))

  khat_trait <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "Khat Use",
    "Khat Use Frequency"
  )

  khat_n_label <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "KU N = 33,210",
    "KUF N = 25,869"
  )

  walters_label <- "Walters Alcohol Dependence Trans-ancestry"

  alcdep_n_label <- "ALCDep N = 52,848"

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0("NeuroGAP P < ", ku_thresh,
           " | Walters P < ", walters_thresh)
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(
        "NGAP: ",
        khat_trait,
        " x ",
        walters_label
      ),
      subtitle = paste0(
        khat_n_label,
        " | ",
        alcdep_n_label,
        " | ",
        plot_label,
        " | SNPs = ",
        nrow(plot_dat),
        " | r = ",
        round(pearson_r, 4)
      ),
      x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
      y = paste0(
        walters_label,
        " beta"
      )
    )

  print(p)
}
```

### PLOTTING ONLY IF BETA FOR KU/KUF I POSITIVE



```{r}

#install.packages("ggplot2")

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```




```{r}
# Hatoum: list all harmonized pairwise files
data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/hatoum_lifted_harmonized"

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_Hatoum2023AddictionEuropean_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

files
```

```{r}
# Hatoum: pvalue threshold
hatoum_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_thresh <- 1e-2
ku_sug_thresh <- 1e-5
```

```{r}
# Hatoum: positive KU/KUF beta graphing

for (file in files) {

  cat("\nProcessing:", basename(file), "\n")

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    fill = TRUE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  x_beta <- grep("^beta_ku$|^beta_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_beta <- grep("^beta_Hatoum2023AddictionEuropean.*_to_khat_A1$", names(dat), value = TRUE)

  x_p <- grep("^p_ku$|^p_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_p <- "P"

  cat("x_beta:", x_beta, "\n")
  cat("y_beta:", y_beta, "\n")
  cat("x_p:", x_p, "\n")
  cat("y_p:", y_p, "\n")

  if (length(x_beta) != 1 ||
      length(y_beta) != 1 ||
      length(x_p) != 1 ||
      !(y_p %in% names(dat))) {
    cat("Skipping because required columns were not found.\n")
    print(names(dat))
    next
  }

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  # Filter to positive KU/KUF betas and p-value thresholds
  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_beta]] > 0 &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < hatoum_thresh,
  ]

  pair_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))

  khat_trait <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "Khat Use",
    "Khat Use Frequency"
  )

  khat_n_label <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "KU N = 33,210",
    "KUF N = 25,869"
  )

  sud_n_label <- "SUD N = 1,025,550"

  cat("Total SNPs:", nrow(dat), "\n")
  cat("Filtered SNPs:", nrow(dat_filt), "\n")

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    dat_filt
  } else {
    dat[
      !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
        dat[[x_beta]] > 0,
    ]
  }

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0("NGAP P < ", ku_thresh, " | Hatoum P < ", hatoum_thresh)
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  # SNPs to highlight
  plot_dat$highlight <- plot_dat[[x_p]] < ku_sug_thresh

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      color = "red",
      size = 2.5
    ) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      aes(label = khat_marker),
      color = "red",
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      box.padding = 0.3,
      point.padding = 0.2
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("NGAP: ", khat_trait, " x Hatoum Addiction European"),
      subtitle = paste0(
        khat_n_label,
        " | ",
        sud_n_label,
        " | ",
        plot_label,
        " | SNPs = ", nrow(plot_dat),
        " | r = ", round(pearson_r, 4),
        " | Suggestive Threshold = ", ku_sug_thresh 
      ),
      x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
      y = "Hatoum Addiction beta"
    )

  print(p)
}

```

```{r}
# Johnson: setup

data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/johnson_lifted_harmonized"

ku_thresh <- 1e-2
johnson_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_sug_thresh <- 1e-5

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_CUD_EUR_casecontrol_public_11\\.14\\.2020_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Files found:", length(files), "\n")
print(basename(files))

```

```{r}
# Johnson: KU/KUF positive beta comparison plots

for (file in files) {

  cat("\nProcessing:", basename(file), "\n")

  is_ku <- grepl("^ku_", basename(file))

  if (is_ku) {
    khat_beta <- "beta_ku"
    khat_p <- "p_ku"
    khat_trait <- "Khat Use"
    khat_n_label <- "KU N = 33,210"
  } else {
    khat_beta <- "beta_kuf"
    khat_p <- "p_kuf"
    khat_trait <- "Khat Use Frequency"
    khat_n_label <- "KUF N = 25,869"
  }

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = FALSE,
    sep = "\t",
    skip = 1,
    fill = TRUE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    col.names = c(
      "khat_marker",
      "CHR",
      "BP",
      "khat_A1",
      "khat_A2",
      khat_beta,
      khat_p,
      "johnson_marker",
      "johnson_A1",
      "johnson_A2",
      "beta_CUD_EUR_casecontrol",
      "beta_CUD_EUR_casecontrol_to_khat_A1",
      "P",
      "allele_match_status",
      "SE",
      "N",
      "N_CAS",
      "N_CON"
    )
  )

  x_beta <- khat_beta
  y_beta <- "beta_CUD_EUR_casecontrol_to_khat_A1"
  x_p <- khat_p
  y_p <- "P"

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  # Filter to positive KU/KUF betas and p-value thresholds
  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_beta]] > 0 &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < johnson_thresh,
  ]

  cat("Total SNPs:", nrow(dat), "\n")
  cat("Filtered SNPs:", nrow(dat_filt), "\n")

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    dat_filt
  } else {
    dat[
      !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
        dat[[x_beta]] > 0,
    ]
  }

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0("NGAP P < ", ku_thresh, " | Johnson P < ", johnson_thresh)
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  # SNPs to highlight
  plot_dat$highlight <- plot_dat[[x_p]] < ku_sug_thresh

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      color = "red",
      size = 2.5
    ) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      aes(label = khat_marker),
      color = "red",
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      box.padding = 0.3,
      point.padding = 0.2
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("NGAP ", khat_trait, " x Johnson CUD European Case-Control"),
      subtitle = paste0(
        khat_n_label,
        " | CUD N = 357,806",
        " | ",
        plot_label,
        " | SNPs = ", nrow(plot_dat),
        " | r = ", round(pearson_r, 4),
        " | Suggestive Threshold = ", ku_sug_thresh
      ),
      x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
      y = "Johnson CUD Beta"
    )

  print(p)
}

# output labels:
# Full public: Everyone
# Case-control: Includes unrelated individuals
```

```{r}
# Levey: setup

data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/levey_lifted_harmonized"

levey_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_thresh <- 1e-2
ku_sug_thresh <- 1e-5

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_(AFR|EUR)_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of files found:", length(files), "\n")
print(basename(files))
```

```{r}
# Levey: beta comparison plots

for (file in files) {

  cat("\nProcessing:", basename(file), "\n")

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    fill = TRUE
  )

  x_beta <- grep("^beta_ku$|^beta_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_beta <- grep("_to_khat_A1$", names(dat), value = TRUE)

  x_p <- grep("^p_ku$|^p_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_p <- "pval"

  cat("x_beta:", x_beta, "\n")
  cat("y_beta:", y_beta, "\n")
  cat("x_p:", x_p, "\n")
  cat("y_p:", y_p, "\n")

  stopifnot(
    length(x_beta) == 1,
    length(y_beta) == 1,
    length(x_p) == 1,
    y_p %in% names(dat)
  )

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  # Filter to positive KU/KUF betas and p-value thresholds
  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_beta]] > 0 &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < levey_thresh,
  ]

  cat("Total SNPs:", nrow(dat), "\n")
  cat("Filtered SNPs:", nrow(dat_filt), "\n")

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    dat_filt
  } else {
    dat[
      !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
        dat[[x_beta]] > 0,
    ]
  }

  # SNPs to highlight
  plot_dat$highlight <- plot_dat[[x_p]] < ku_sug_thresh

  pair_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))

  khat_trait <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "Khat Use",
    "Khat Use Frequency"
  )

  ancestry_label <- ifelse(
    grepl("_AFR_", pair_name),
    "African",
    "European"
  )

  levey_trait <- paste0("Levey ", ancestry_label)

  cud_n_label <- ifelse(
    ancestry_label == "African",
    "CUD N = 123,208",
    "CUD N = 886,025"
  )

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0("NeuroGAP P < ", ku_thresh, " | Levey P < ", levey_thresh)
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      color = "red",
      size = 2.5
    ) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      aes(label = khat_marker),
      color = "red",
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      box.padding = 0.3,
      point.padding = 0.2
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("NGAP: ", khat_trait, " x ", levey_trait, " CUD"),
      subtitle = paste0(
        cud_n_label,
        " | ",
        plot_label,
        " | SNPs = ", nrow(plot_dat),
        " | r = ", round(pearson_r, 4),
        " | Suggestive Threshold = ", ku_sug_thresh
      ),
      x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
      y = "CUD Beta"
    )

  print(p)
}
```


```{r}
# Liu: Read ins 

data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/liu_lifted_harmonized"

liu_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_thresh <- 1e-2
ku_sug_thresh <- 1e-5

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_.+_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

length(files)
basename(files)

```

```{r}
# Liu: beta comparisons

for (file in files) {

  cat("\nProcessing:", basename(file), "\n")

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    fill = TRUE
  )

  x_beta <- grep("^beta_ku$|^beta_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_beta <- grep("_to_khat_A1$", names(dat), value = TRUE)

  x_p <- grep("^p_ku$|^p_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_p <- "PVALUE"

  cat("x_beta:", x_beta, "\n")
  cat("y_beta:", y_beta, "\n")
  cat("x_p:", x_p, "\n")
  cat("y_p:", y_p, "\n")

  stopifnot(
    length(x_beta) == 1,
    length(y_beta) == 1,
    length(x_p) == 1,
    y_p %in% names(dat)
  )

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  # Filter to positive KU/KUF betas and p-value thresholds
  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_beta]] > 0 &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < liu_thresh,
  ]

  cat("Total SNPs:", nrow(dat), "\n")
  cat("Filtered SNPs:", nrow(dat_filt), "\n")

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    dat_filt
  } else {
    dat[
      !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
        dat[[x_beta]] > 0,
    ]
  }

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0("NeuroGAP P < ", ku_thresh, " | Liu P < ", liu_thresh)
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  # SNPs to highlight
  plot_dat$highlight <- plot_dat[[x_p]] < ku_sug_thresh

  pair_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))

  khat_trait <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "Khat Use",
    "Khat Use Frequency"
  )

  liu_trait <- sub("^(ku|kuf)_", "", pair_name)
  liu_trait <- sub("_harmonized$", "", liu_trait)

  liu_trait <- switch(
    liu_trait,
    AgeofInitiation = "Age of Initiation",
    AgeOfInitiation_WithoutUKB = "Age of Initiation (No UKBB)",
    CigarettesPerDay = "Cigarettes per Day",
    CigarettesPerDay_WithoutUKB = "Cigarettes per Day (No UKBB)",
    DrinksPerWeek = "Drinks per Week",
    DrinksPerWeek_WithoutUKB = "Drinks per Week (No UKB)",
    SmokingInitiation = "Smoking Initiation",
    SmokingInitiation_WithoutUKB = "Smoking Initiation (No UKBB)",
    SmokingCessation = "Smoking Cessation",
    SmokingCessation_WithoutUKB = "Smoking Cessation (No UKBB)",
    liu_trait
  )

  khat_n_label <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "KU N = 33,210",
    "KUF N = 25,869"
  )

  liu_n_lookup <- c(
  "Smoking Initiation" = "632,802",
  "Smoking Initiation (No UKB)" = "559,471",
  "Smoking Cessation" = "312,821",
  "Smoking Cessation (No UKB)" = "281,073",
  "Drinks per Week" = "537,349",
  "Drinks per Week (No UKB)" = "477,350",
  "Cigarettes per Day" = "263,954",
  "Cigarettes per Day (No UKB)" = "242,429",
  "Age of Initiation" = "262,990",
  "Age of Initiation (No UKB)" = "240,603"
  )

  liu_n_label <- if (liu_trait %in% names(liu_n_lookup)) {
    paste0(liu_trait, " N = ", liu_n_lookup[[liu_trait]])
  } else {
    paste0(liu_trait, " N = NA")
  }

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      color = "red",
      size = 2.5
    ) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      aes(label = khat_marker),
      color = "red",
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      box.padding = 0.3,
      point.padding = 0.2
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 10),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 7)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(
        "NGAP: ",
        khat_trait,
        " x Liu: ",
        liu_trait
      ),
      subtitle = paste0(
        khat_n_label,
        " | ",
        liu_n_label,
        " | ",
        plot_label,
        " | SNPs = ", nrow(plot_dat),
        " | r = ", round(pearson_r, 4),
        " | Suggestive: p<", ku_sug_thresh
      ),
      x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
      y = paste0(liu_trait, " beta")
    )

  print(p)
}
```

```{r}
# Saunders: setup

data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/saunders_lifted_harmonized"

saunders_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_thresh <- 1e-2
ku_sug_thresh

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_(AgeSmk|CigDay|DrnkWk|SmkCes|SmkInit)_(AFR|AMR|EAS|EUR)_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of files found:", length(files), "\n")
print(basename(files))
```

```{r}
# Saunders: beta comparison plots

for (file in files) {

  cat("\nProcessing:", basename(file), "\n")

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    fill = TRUE
  )

  x_beta <- grep("^beta_ku$|^beta_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_beta <- grep("_to_khat_A1$", names(dat), value = TRUE)

  x_p <- grep("^p_ku$|^p_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_p <- "P"

  cat("x_beta:", x_beta, "\n")
  cat("y_beta:", y_beta, "\n")
  cat("x_p:", x_p, "\n")
  cat("y_p:", y_p, "\n")

  stopifnot(
    length(x_beta) == 1,
    length(y_beta) == 1,
    length(x_p) == 1,
    y_p %in% names(dat)
  )

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  # Filter to positive KU/KUF betas and p-value thresholds
  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_beta]] > 0 &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < saunders_thresh,
  ]

  cat("Total SNPs:", nrow(dat), "\n")
  cat("Filtered SNPs:", nrow(dat_filt), "\n")

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    dat_filt
  } else {
    dat[
      !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
        dat[[x_beta]] > 0,
    ]
  }

  # SNPs to highlight in red
  plot_dat$highlight <- plot_dat[[x_p]] < ku_sug_thresh

  pair_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))

  khat_trait <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "Khat Use",
    "Khat Use Frequency"
  )

  khat_n_label <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "KU N = 33,210",
    "KUF N = 25,869"
  )

  saunders_raw <- sub("^(ku|kuf)_", "", pair_name)
  saunders_raw <- sub("_harmonized$", "", saunders_raw)

  ancestry <- sub("^.*_(AFR|AMR|EAS|EUR)$", "\\1", saunders_raw)
  trait_raw <- sub("_(AFR|AMR|EAS|EUR)$", "", saunders_raw)

  ancestry_label <- switch(
    ancestry,
    AFR = "AFR",
    AMR = "AMR",
    EAS = "EAS",
    EUR = "EUR",
    ancestry
  )

  trait_label <- switch(
    trait_raw,
    AgeSmk = "Age SmkInit",
    CigDay = "Cigs per Day",
    DrnkWk = "Drnks per Week",
    SmkCes = "Age SmkCess",
    SmkInit = "SmkInit",
    trait_raw
  )

  saunders_n <- case_when(
    trait_raw == "SmkInit" & ancestry == "EUR" ~ 805431,
    trait_raw == "SmkInit" & ancestry == "AMR" ~ 286026,
    trait_raw == "SmkInit" & ancestry == "AFR" ~ 119589,
    trait_raw == "SmkInit" & ancestry == "EAS" ~ 296395,

    trait_raw == "AgeSmk" & ancestry == "EUR" ~ 323836,
    trait_raw == "AgeSmk" & ancestry == "AMR" ~ 33914,
    trait_raw == "AgeSmk" & ancestry == "AFR" ~ 17508,
    trait_raw == "AgeSmk" & ancestry == "EAS" ~ 63353,

    trait_raw == "CigDay" & ancestry == "EUR" ~ 326497,
    trait_raw == "CigDay" & ancestry == "AMR" ~ 35129,
    trait_raw == "CigDay" & ancestry == "AFR" ~ 20157,
    trait_raw == "CigDay" & ancestry == "EAS" ~ 108275,

    trait_raw == "SmkCes" & ancestry == "EUR" ~ 388313,
    trait_raw == "SmkCes" & ancestry == "AMR" ~ 90525,
    trait_raw == "SmkCes" & ancestry == "AFR" ~ 34970,
    trait_raw == "SmkCes" & ancestry == "EAS" ~ 121859,

    trait_raw == "DrnkWk" & ancestry == "EUR" ~ 666978,
    trait_raw == "DrnkWk" & ancestry == "AMR" ~ 274707,
    trait_raw == "DrnkWk" & ancestry == "AFR" ~ 95343,
    trait_raw == "DrnkWk" & ancestry == "EAS" ~ 160775,

    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )

  saunders_n_label <- paste0(
    trait_label,
    " ",
    ancestry,
    " N = ",
    format(saunders_n, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE)
  )

  saunders_label <- paste0(
    "Saunders ",
    trait_label,
    " ",
    ancestry_label
  )

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0("NGAP P < ", ku_thresh, " | Saunders P < ", saunders_thresh)
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      color = "red",
      size = 2.5
    ) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      aes(label = khat_marker),
      color = "red",
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      box.padding = 0.3,
      point.padding = 0.2
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 10),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 7)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("NGAP: ", khat_trait, " x ", saunders_label),
      subtitle = paste0(
        khat_n_label,
        " | ",
        saunders_n_label,
        " | ",
        plot_label,
        " | SNPs = ", nrow(plot_dat),
        " | r = ", round(pearson_r, 4),
        " | Suggestive Threshold = ", ku_sug_thresh
      ),
      x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
      y = paste0(trait_raw, " beta")
    )

  print(p)
}

# Note: Data for EUR doesn't include 23andMe
```

```{r}
# Walters: setup

data_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/sud/walters_lifted_harmonized"

walters_thresh <- 1e-3
ku_thresh <- 1e-2
ku_sug_thresh <- 1e-5

files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "^(ku|kuf)_pgc_alcdep_trans_fe_unrel_geno_harmonized\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of files found:", length(files), "\n")
print(basename(files))
```

```{r}
# Walters: positive KU/KUF beta comparison plots

for (file in files) {

  cat("\nProcessing:", basename(file), "\n")

  dat <- read.table(
    file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    fill = TRUE
  )

  x_beta <- grep("^beta_ku$|^beta_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_beta <- grep("_to_khat_A1$", names(dat), value = TRUE)

  x_p <- grep("^p_ku$|^p_kuf$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
  y_p <- "P"

  cat("x_beta:", x_beta, "\n")
  cat("y_beta:", y_beta, "\n")
  cat("x_p:", x_p, "\n")
  cat("y_p:", y_p, "\n")

  stopifnot(
    length(x_beta) == 1,
    length(y_beta) == 1,
    length(x_p) == 1,
    y_p %in% names(dat)
  )

  dat[[x_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_beta]])
  dat[[y_beta]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_beta]])
  dat[[x_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[x_p]])
  dat[[y_p]] <- as.numeric(dat[[y_p]])

  # Filter to positive KU/KUF betas and p-value thresholds
  dat_filt <- dat[
    !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
      !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
      dat[[x_beta]] > 0 &
      dat[[x_p]] < ku_thresh &
      dat[[y_p]] < walters_thresh,
  ]

  cat("Total SNPs:", nrow(dat), "\n")
  cat("Filtered SNPs:", nrow(dat_filt), "\n")

  plot_dat <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    dat_filt
  } else {
    dat[
      !is.na(dat[[x_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_beta]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[x_p]]) &
        !is.na(dat[[y_p]]) &
        dat[[x_beta]] > 0,
    ]
  }

  # SNPs to highlight in red
  plot_dat$highlight <- plot_dat[[x_p]] < ku_sug_thresh

  pair_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))

  khat_trait <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "Khat Use",
    "Khat Use Frequency"
  )

  khat_n_label <- ifelse(
    grepl("^ku_", pair_name),
    "KU N = 33,210",
    "KUF N = 25,869"
  )

  walters_label <- "Walters Alcohol Dependence"

  alcdep_n_label <- "ALCDep N = 52,848"

  plot_label <- if (nrow(dat_filt) >= 3) {
    paste0(
      "NeuroGAP P < ", ku_thresh,
      " | Walters P < ", walters_thresh
    )
  } else {
    "Unfiltered SNPs shown because fewer than 3 SNPs passed filters"
  }

  pearson_r <- cor(
    plot_dat[[x_beta]],
    plot_dat[[y_beta]],
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )

  p <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(
      x = .data[[x_beta]],
      y = .data[[y_beta]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      color = "red",
      size = 2.5
    ) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = subset(plot_dat, highlight),
      aes(label = khat_marker),
      color = "red",
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      box.padding = 0.3,
      point.padding = 0.2
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 7),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 4)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(
        "NGAP: ",
        khat_trait,
        " x ",
        walters_label
      ),
      subtitle = paste0(
        khat_n_label,
        " | ",
        alcdep_n_label,
        " | ",
        plot_label,
        " | SNPs = ",
        nrow(plot_dat),
        " | r = ",
        round(pearson_r, 4),
        " | Suggestive Threshold = ",
        ku_sug_thresh
      ),
      x = paste0(khat_trait, " beta"),
      y = paste0(
        walters_label,
        " beta"
      )
    )

  print(p)
}
```
